customers_say: Customers find the water purifier to be among the best in its category, with excellent installation by Aquaguard experts and good value for money. The product receives positive feedback for its taste, design, and water quality, with one customer noting its effectiveness in removing impurities. The service aspect receives mixed reviews, with some customers praising the excellent service while others report poor service experiences.

reviews.author: V Tyson
reviews.title: Maintain installation process on same day
reviews.body: Good product but for installation it taken 4 days

reviews.author: ARKA ROY
reviews.title: Excellent product and after sales service
reviews.body: I have purchased 2 of these in the last 1 year. Very good product. Very essential for your home. Also Aquaguard Service is top-notch

reviews.author: Placeholder
reviews.title: Great Water Quality and Smooth Installation
reviews.body: Using this Aquaguard RO for the past week. The water taste is excellent, installation was smooth, and the IoT features are useful and easy to use. Overall, a great product with good service. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.title: Good and within the budget
reviews.body: Good product. Look and color wise. Functioning properly and less noisy

reviews.author: Bobby Bujji
reviews.title: Good product and nice performance
reviews.body: It's good product and easyly instalation proses it works nice water purifying good tq
